title: Boat Rental in Accra: A Practical Guide for 2026
html:
Choosing a boat to rent in Accra involves weighing your group size, budget and preferred cruising grounds. Starting from Labadi Pleasure Beach, prices range from €150 for a half-day motorboat to €1,200 for a crewed yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators so you can compare your options easily.

Where to set off in Accra

Accra's coastline offers several departure points, each with its own character. Labadi Pleasure Beach is the most popular public launching spot, busy at weekends but convenient for exploring the shore. Marina Accra, near the Airport City district, provides sheltered berths and fuel services for larger vessels. Kokrobite Beach, a 30-minute drive west, is quieter and favoured for sunset trips. Ada Foah, about two hours east, marks the Volta River estuary where you can cruise between mangroves and sandbars. Sakumono lagoon offers a more intimate setting for birdwatching tours.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, ideal for luxury day trips or overnight stays; up to 12 guests; from €1,000 per day. For a premium example, this motor yacht combines a flybridge, spacious saloon and crew.
  2. Catamaran, stable and spacious, perfect for families or groups of up to 20; from €800 for a full day.
  3. Speedboat / RIB, fast and nimble for watersports and short excursions; up to 8 guests; from €200 per hour.
  4. Sailboat, a classic choice for a relaxed cruise along the coast; up to 6 guests; from €350 half-day.
  5. Traditional pirogue, local wooden canoe used for fishing trips or lagoon exploration; up to 4 guests; from €50 for a two-hour tour.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Accra?

Costs vary by boat type, duration and season, with shared tours from €30 per person and private charters from €150.

  • Shared sunset cruise (2 hours): €30, €50 per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, up to 6 people): €150, €250.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, up to 20 guests): €800, €1,200.
  • Fully crewed yacht (day charter, up to 12 guests): €1,000, €1,500.

To see current availability and exact prices, hire a boat through BoatHire24, where you can filter by boat type, capacity and price.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Accra?

For most rental boats a skipper is provided, so no personal licence is required; if you wish to self-drive, the operator confirms exact requirements.

In Ghana, recreational boat licences are issued by the Ghana Maritime Authority, but rental companies almost always include a qualified skipper. If you insist on bareboat charter (rare in Accra), expect to show an International Certificate of Competence or equivalent.

High season runs from November to April when the Atlantic swells are smaller and the Harmattan wind keeps skies clear. Book ahead for Christmas and Easter weeks.

At a glance

  • Price band: €30, €1,500 per trip
  • Peak months: November to April
  • Trip length: 2, 8 hours typical
  • Maximum guests: 4, 20 depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR (prices often quoted in USD but converted)

Questions about boat rental in Accra

Is it safe to rent a boat in Accra?

Yes, when using a reputable operator that provides life jackets, a working VHF radio and a trained skipper; BoatHire24 lists only verified boats.

Can I take a boat from Accra to Ada Foah?

Yes, it is about 30 nautical miles east, a two-hour motorboat ride, best done as a full-day trip with a stop at a beach resort.

What should I bring on a boat trip in Accra?

Sunscreen, a hat, swimwear, a towel, snacks and cash for tips; most charter boats supply water and soft drinks but confirm when booking.

How far in advance should I book a charter in 2026?

At least two weeks ahead for peak season (December, March) and one week for other months to secure your preferred boat.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Accra or list your own. With verified boats, transparent pricing and local support, arranging your day on the water is straightforward. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and start earning.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Accra and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
